entry.data:
MOSTLY CLOUDY
HIGHS IN THE LOWER 70S
SOUTH WINDS 15 TO 20 MPH WITH GUSTS UP TO 30 MPH

MOSTLY CLOUDY
LOWS IN THE LOWER 60S
SOUTH WINDS 10 TO 15 MPH

PARTLY SUNNY
HIGHS IN THE UPPER 70S
SOUTHWEST WINDS 15 TO 20 MPH

MOSTLY CLOUDY WITH A CHANCE OF THUNDERSTORMS
A CHANCE OF SHOWERS IN THE EVENING, THEN SHOWERS AFTER MIDNIGHT
LOWS IN THE MID 60S
SOUTH WINDS 15 TO 20 MPH WITH GUSTS UP TO 30 MPH
CHANCE OF RAIN 80 PERCENT

A CHANCE OF THUNDERSTORMS IN THE MORNING
SHOWERS
HIGHS IN THE LOWER 70S
TEMPERATURE FALLING INTO THE UPPER 50S IN THE AFTERNOON
SOUTHWEST WINDS AROUND 15 MPH, BECOMING WEST IN THE AFTERNOON
CHANCE OF RAIN NEAR 100 PERCENT

MOSTLY CLOUDY
MUCH COOLER WITH LOWS IN THE MID 30S

data.HIGHS: SUNNY, COOLER WITH HIGHS IN THE MID 50S

entry.data:
PARTLY CLOUDY IN THE EVENING, THEN BECOMING MOSTLY CLOUDY
LOWS IN THE LOWER 40S

MOSTLY CLOUDY
HIGHS IN THE MID 60S
LOWS IN THE LOWER 40S

MOSTLY CLEAR
HIGHS AROUND 70
LOWS IN THE LOWER 50S

MOSTLY SUNNY IN THE MORNING, THEN BECOMING MOSTLY CLOUDY
A 50 PERCENT CHANCE OF SHOWERS
HIGHS IN THE UPPER 60S
